events.summary: Phase 0 Research opened. Reconciling the 2026-04-28 signature-expansion note (pre-experiment, static-TOPS-profile-focused) with the now-CONFIRMED Phase 2-bis empirical streaming-signature results. Isolated worktree off origin/main.
Phase 0 Research approved (Approach B empirical-first). Reachable-now substrates: cloud/API endpoints + operator M-series Macs (ollama) + iPhone A-series; Snapdragon/Intel/AMD → harness+priors.
Phase 1 PRD opened after Phase 0 approval. has_ui=false (integration spec, not UX). Scope: calibratable-now surface + on-device harness + tagged priors + §5 schema additions.
Phase 1 PRD approved. Hardware locked: current machine M4 (D4); iPhone 14 Pro = A16 Bionic (D5). M4 calibration also serves K2 generalization check (Sub-exp 2 was M2).
Phase 2 Tasks opened. 9 tasks: T1 schema v1.1 (foundation) → T2 reader/attester → T3 harness → T4 M4 calib → T5 A16 path → T6 cloud calib → T7 priors → T8 tests/no-regression → T9 docs.
Phase 2 Tasks approved (9 tasks). Operator chose full integration spec before implementation.
Phase 3b Integration spec opened (has_ui=false). Nails the schema v1.1 contract for 3 files + reader/attester behavior + harness I/O contract + migration + backward-compat before any code.

Integration spec written. Reality-check: v1.1 scaffolding (24 profiles, precisions[], compute_axes, vendor_status, enums) ALREADY shipped by prior session. Real delta narrowed to per-row calibration_status (instrumented|prior_unvalidated) across 3 files + reference class field + reader/attester guardrail + on-device harness + migration.
Phase 3b Integration spec approved. Reality-check accepted (scaffolding already shipped; scope = calibration_status honesty layer + empirical calibration).
Phase 4 Implementation opened. Building T1 schema migration first (calibration_status across 3 catalogs + class on reference endpoints + memory_topology).

T1-T4+T8 done. Migration stamped calibration_status across 3 catalogs (8 ref->instrumented+class, 24 profiles->prior, 12 sigs->prior, 10 Apple memory_topology). Builder stamps instrumented+class. Attest guardrail excludes explicit priors (backward-compat: untagged stays candidate). On-device harness built + REAL M4 calibration (ttft 0.095s, tps 41, n=80) — K2 PASS (M2 0.179s vs M4 0.095s = generalizes+discriminates). 18 tests pass (9 new + 9 no-regression). Finding: single-shot attestation unreliable on tight on-device clusters (RQ5); distribution centroids distinct (recognition holds).

T5/T6/T7/T9 done. T5 A16 documented as harness target (no local-inference route). T6 cloud calibrator hadf-calibrate-cloud.py shipped + mock-tested (live run is operator-paid). T7 priors already present, migration-tagged. T9 case study + README harness section. 19 tests pass.
Phase 5 Testing — 19/19 tests pass (10 feature + 9 Phase 3A no-regression); real M4 calibration verified; no high-risk files touched.
Phase 6 Review — diff touches scripts/ + .claude/shared/hadf catalogs + chip-profiles.json; no Swift/auth/sync/AI high-risk files; guardrail + no-regression test-enforced.
Phase 7 Merge — opening PR for operator review + merge approval (no auto-merge).

Packaged the expansion as a one-command experiment: manifest (signature-expansion-endpoints.json) + runner (hadf-signature-expansion-run.sh, --dry-run validated) + Makefile targets (hadf-expand-signatures / hadf-calibrate-device / hadf-calibrate-cloud / hadf-migrate-calibration-status). Mistral routed via openai-compat (matches collector). Ready to fire on cmd; 19 tests pass.
Phase 9 CLOSED via close-feature.py. PR #644 squashed onto main as 81b4d8d120 (operator-merged 2026-06-06T04:10:18Z). state.json merge→complete with full audit transitions + merge metadata.
